metadata.title:
SPECIAL NOTICE.

Notice OF School District Bond


Election

pages.raw_text:
Election


Notice Is hereby given that a spe-
cial election will be held In school
district No. 81. Spokane county, state
of Washington. on the 10th day of
October, 1908. for the purpose of de-
termining whether or not the direc-
tors of said school district shall bor-
row money and issue bonds Of the
district In the sum of four hundred
thousand dollars ($400.00O for the
purpose of purchasing sites and
erecting school buildings. Said bonds
If issued shall bear interest not to
exceed four and one-half per centum
per annum. payable semi-annually;
and bonds to be payable in twenty
(2O) years from date thereof.


The election will be by ballot.
Those in favor of the issuing of bonds
as above specified will vote. Bonds.
yes; those opposed. Bonds. no."


The polls will be open from 1
o'clock p. IN. to o'clock p. m.


Tho polling places will be as fol-
lows:


Ward /. building E2l7 Third ave-
nue.,


Ward Q. High school.


Ward 3. Washington school.


Ward 4, Bancroft school.


Ward 5. Webster school.


Bisbee precinct. First avenue and
Haven street, Bankson Bros office
BY order of the board of directors.
Dated this 10th day of September
1908. Il. \. THOMAS,
Secretary of the Board of Directors
